name: Ohyul пҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ В
description:
Friends with benefitsпҫүвҒ вҷЎ

Maybe friends don't hug 24 hours a day, Maybe friends don't always sleep together...maybe they won't kiss, but that's his your friendship with Ohyul.

Can we talk about how handsome Ohyul is and almost no one wants to know? Like, he's too handsome to be true.

I might create other bots about the other boys, but it will take a while.

If the bot responds for you, just restart it, it should work (вҒ дәәвҒ  вҒ вҖўНҲвҒ бҙ—вҒ вҖўНҲвҒ )
